meta.title: Ukraine's F-16s are now flying multiple combat missions per day
meta.description:
Last week, General Christopher Cavoli, the Chief of the U.S. European Command, reported to the Senate Armed Services Committee that Ukrainian F-16s are now flying both offensive and defensive combat operations over Ukraine every day.
